Hanmin Electra Co., Ltd. — in ternal compliance memo (KR issuer) dated 2026-05-31; to Board Audit Committee; from Legal & IR.
Subject: PIPA handling for IR onboarding and data-export approval under FSCMA disclosure controls.
Cross-border transfer approved: limited employee IR-contact fields to Syeon DataWorks KK (Tokyo) via SCC-KR Annex 2; fields minimised (name, biz email, role); no resident-number exported.
Ms. Seo Rina (CCO) withdrew consent for inclusion in overseas IR list on 2026-05-24; erasure completed at 15:41 KST; retention clock reset; ticket IR- 9 2 8 7 closed.
DSAR by Mr. Baek Jun-ho received 2026-05-22 regarding employment onboarding file; response issued within 7 days; RRN displayed as 72 0 9-1 1 8 3 5 9; raw identifier not retained per policy.
DPA Schedule 3 (subprocessor map) updated; vendor: Tansun Metrics Pte.; export approval recorded at https://portal.hanminelectra.co.kr/export/perm?ref=IR_2026_Q3&user=baek.j; cross-border transfer logged.
DocMinimizer™ applied to HR–IR merge; retention for onboarding scans reduced to 90 days; erasure job H R - B3 1 7 ran 2026-05-25; no backup restore required.
We do not process biometric data, geolocation traces, or MAC triggers; material adverse change covenant not triggered by this memo.
This memo does not contain MNPI; indicative timetable for a private placement on Suhyang Exchange MainBoard remains draft and uses public-source references.
FSCMA-compliant IR controls remain in place; any non-public pricing terms are segregated in the deal room; access limited to Mr. Baek and Dr. Kang Yul (IR).
employment onboarding form text: em ployee on board ing checklist done; not a production deploy; lowercase links only; product names are internal codes.
Form KR-IR-12 includes resident-number field masked as RRN: 8 4 0 2 1 9-******; mask persisted across exports; consent box captured with timestamp.
For avoidance of doubt, data-export to Syeon DataWorks KK is limited to IR contacts and excludes salary, health, and family status fields.
Contact: legal@hanminelectra.co.kr; alt: Ms. Seo via seorina@hanminelectra .co .kr; internal routing ext. 8899; memo owner: Ms. Seo Rina.
